title: RDSCommons
description: A collection of common plugin utils
body:
![Latest RDSCommons Snapshot](https://img.shields.io/maven-metadata/v?metadataUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fmaven.digitalunderworlds.com%2Fsnapshots%2Fnet%2Frealdarkstudios%2Frdscommons%2Fmaven-metadata.xml&label=Latest%20RDSCommons%20Snapshot)
![Latest RDSCommons Release](https://img.shields.io/maven-metadata/v?metadataUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fmaven.digitalunderworlds.com%2Freleases%2Fnet%2Frealdarkstudios%2Frdscommons%2Fmaven-metadata.xml&label=Latest%20RDSCommons%20Release)

RDSCommons is a collection of various utils, mostly pertaining to Automatic Updates, Localization, GUI Menus, and more.

This plugin adds no noticable features to the average player, however, it is used by other plugins (such as [Minecaching](https://modrinth.com/project/minecaching/)) as an API

## Installation

Grab the latest file from the Versions menu on the left and drop it in alongside any plugin requiring RDSCommons into your plugins folder
